# HouseHunt

> HouseHunt is the premier zero-brokerage real estate platform in Delhi NCR (India), allowing users to buy, sell, and rent residential and commercial properties directly with verified owners, eliminating middleman fees. Powered by Aarambh Realtors.

## Key Features & Value Proposition

- **Zero Brokerage / No Broker**: Direct owner listings. Buyers and renters connect directly with owners via live chat and calls.
- **Verified Listings**: Every property goes through verification to ensure authenticity.
- **Dynamic Search & Filters**: Filter by budget, BHK (1, 2, 3, 4+ BHK), property type, furnishing, and ready-to-move status.
- **Delhi NCR Geocoding**: Deep localization for key regions: Noida, Gurgaon, Delhi, Ghaziabad, Faridabad, and Greater Noida.
- **HuntAI Assistant**: Integrated AI real estate assistant that guides users through property hunting, localized research, and mortgage calculations.

## Page Map

- [Home Page](https://househunt-frontend-one.vercel.app/index.html) - Main dashboard with featured listings near you, top developers, and city selector.
- [Explore Properties](https://househunt-frontend-one.vercel.app/html/explore.html) - Complete property catalog with advanced sorting, price filters, and locality searches.
- [HuntAI Chatbot](https://househunt-frontend-one.vercel.app/html/404ai.html) - Interactive AI-powered conversational search for real estate guidance.
- [Post Property (Free)](https://househunt-frontend-one.vercel.app/html/hosttype.html) - Free listing posting gateway for property owners.
- [User Profiles & Messages](https://househunt-frontend-one.vercel.app/html/messages.html) - Secure messaging hub for direct owner-buyer negotiations.
- [Mortgage Calculator](https://househunt-frontend-one.vercel.app/html/mortgage.html) - Localized home loan and mortgage payment estimator.
